title: Quantum Alignment results.csv schema
description: Schema for the per-row records produced by quantum_alignment_tests.py and exported as results.csv. Downstream tooling (the L103 Quantum Sweep CSV importer, dashboards, notebooks) should validate against this contract before parsing.

experiment.description: Which of the four experiments produced this row.

mode.description: Execution mode. 'ideal' = AerSimulator, 'noisy' = AerSimulator with fake-backend noise, 'real' = IBM Quantum hardware via qiskit-ibm-runtime.

label.description: Row label specific to the experiment. For phase: 'pi/4' etc. For observation: 'A_no_mid_measure' / 'B_mid_measure'. For noise_depth: 'xx_pairs=8'. For bell: 'pi/4|00' etc., or 'pi/4|corr' for the correlation summary row.

parameter.description: Numeric value of the swept parameter (radians for theta; integer pair-count for noise_depth).

p0.description: Empirical probability of the 'zero' outcome — or, for bell|corr rows, the signed correlation E(theta) = (P00+P11) - (P01+P10) which can be negative. NaN allowed for Skipped rows.

p1.description: Empirical probability of the 'one' outcome. NaN allowed for bell|corr summary rows and Skipped rows.

expected_p0.description: Closed-form ideal probability for the row's parameter, where one is well-defined (NaN otherwise).

error.description: |p0 - expected_p0|. NaN where expected_p0 is NaN.

notes.description: Free-form note. Skipped rows include the reason here ('Skipped: selected backend does not support mid-circuit measurement.').
